Get in Touch

Have a question, issue, or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.

Email Us

For support, billing, or general questions.

support@timestampai.app
Response Time

We typically respond within 24–48 hours on business days.

Common Topics

Credit issues · Payment questions · Bug reports · Feature requests

Send us a message

Quick Answers

My credits didn't appear after payment

Card payments are usually instant. Crypto payments may take a few minutes. If more than 15 minutes have passed, email us with your payment receipt and we'll add the credits manually.

The timestamps are inaccurate

AI-generated timestamps are based on audio and content analysis. Quality can vary with videos that have little speech or background noise. Try re-submitting if results seem off.

My video upload failed

Files must be a supported video format (MP4, MOV, AVI, etc.) and not exceed the size limit. If your upload keeps failing, try a different browser or contact us with details.

Can I get a refund?

All credit purchases are final once credits are added. If you believe there was an error in your purchase, contact us and we'll review it.

I forgot my account / can't sign in

Sign-in uses your email address. Make sure you're entering the same email used originally. If problems persist, email us.
